'''鈭歽-ng-m''' ('''yangama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umber|umber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umber|umber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| yangama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangamithi|yangamithi]] || [[word:yangamiji|yangamiji]] || [[word:yangamishi|yangamishi]] || [[word:yangami|yangami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangamuthuth|yangamuthuth]] || [[word:yangamujuj|yangamujuj]] || [[word:yangamushush|yangamushush]] || [[word:yangam|yangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangamuthu|yangamuthu]] || [[word:yangamuju|yangamuju]] || [[word:yangamushu|yangamushu]] || [[word:yangamu|yangamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangamufuth|yangamufuth]] || [[word:yangamufuj|yangamufuj]] || [[word:yangamufush|yangamufush]] || [[word:yangamuf|yangamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangamethe|yangamethe]] || [[word:yangameje|yangameje]] || [[word:yangameshe|yangameshe]] || [[word:yangame|yangame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangamothoth|yangamothoth]] || [[word:yangamojoj|yangamojoj]] || [[word:yangamoshosh|yangamoshosh]] || [[word:yangam|yangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangamotho|yangamotho]] || [[word:yangamojo|yangamojo]] || [[word:yangamosho|yangamosho]] || [[word:yangamo|yangamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangamofoth|yangamofoth]] || [[word:yangamofoj|yangamofoj]] || [[word:yangamofosh|yangamofosh]] || [[word:yangamof|yangamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangam忙th忙|yangam忙th忙]] || [[word:yangam忙j忙|yangam忙j忙]] || [[word:yangam忙sh忙|yangam忙sh忙]] || [[word:yangam忙|yangam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangamathath|yangamathath]] || [[word:yangamajaj|yangamajaj]] || [[word:yangamashash|yangamashash]] || [[word:yangam|yangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangamatha|yangamatha]] || [[word:yangamaja|yangamaja]] || [[word:yangamasha|yangamasha]] || [[word:yangama|yangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangamafath|yangamafath]] || [[word:yangamafaj|yangamafaj]] || [[word:yangamafash|yangamafash]] || [[word:yangamaf|yangamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yangamasha|yangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyangamasha|goyangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyangamasha|gokiyangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yangamn眉sha|yangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyangamnkn眉sha|goyangamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangamn眉sha|gokiyangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yangamsh毛sha|yangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyangamnksh毛sha|goyangamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyangamsh毛sha|gokiyangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangamrosha|yangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangamnkrosha|goyangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangamrosha|gokiyangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yangamusha|yangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangamnkmusha|goyangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangamusha|gokiyangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yangamsherasha|yangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyangamnksherasha|goyangamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyangamsherasha|gokiyangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yangamngasha|yangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyangamnkngasha|goyangamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyangamngasha|gokiyangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yangamyasha|yangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyangamnkyasha|goyangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyangamyasha|gokiyangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yangamyamasha|yangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyangamnkyamasha|goyangamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyangamyamasha|gokiyangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangamn眉sh毛sha|yangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangamnkn眉sh毛sha|goyangamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangamn眉sh毛sha|gokiyangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangamn眉rosha|yangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangamnkn眉rosha|goyangamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangamn眉rosha|gokiyangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangamn眉musha|yangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangamnkn眉musha|goyangamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangamn眉musha|gokiyangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangamsh毛n眉sha|yangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangamnksh毛n眉sha|goyangamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangamsh毛n眉sha|gokiyangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangamsh毛rosha|yangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangamnksh毛rosha|goyangamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangamsh毛rosha|gokiyangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangamsh毛musha|yangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangamnksh毛musha|goyangamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangamsh毛musha|gokiyangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangamron眉sha|yangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangamnkron眉sha|goyangamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangamron眉sha|gokiyangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangamrosh毛sha|yangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangamnkrosh毛sha|goyangamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangamrosh毛sha|gokiyangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangamromusha|yangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangamnkromusha|goyangamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangamromusha|gokiyangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangamun眉sha|yangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangamnkmun眉sha|goyangamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangamun眉sha|gokiyangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangamush毛sha|yangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangamnkmush毛sha|goyangamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangamush毛sha|gokiyangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangamurosha|yangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangamnkmurosha|goyangamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangamurosha|gokiyangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yangam|yangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙ng忙m|y忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyangam|hoyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙ng忙m|hoy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyangam|hohoyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙ng忙m|hohoy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yangam|n眉yangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙ng忙m|n眉y忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yangam|n眉n眉yangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙ng忙m|n眉n眉y忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yangam|n茂yangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙ng忙m|n茂y忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yangam|n茂n茂yangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙ng忙m|n茂n茂y忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyangam|luyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙ng忙m|luy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyangam|luluyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙ng忙m|luluy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyangam|liyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙ng忙m|liy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyangam|liliyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙ng忙m|liliy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyangam|koyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙ng忙m|koy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyangam|kokoyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙ng忙m|kokoy忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyangam|keyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙ng忙m|key忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyangam|kekeyangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙ng忙m|kekey忙ng忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
